codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocker by moving the calendar post-switch presence/absence checks onto the calendar grid container itself, while preserving the existing list and timesheet view-local assertions for VAL-REG-002.

summary: Pass: commit 6f1763a fixes the prior workspace-scoping review failure by replacing page-wide calendar text assertions with calendar-grid-scroll-area scoped locators after switching away and back. The feature pair now provides view-local proof across calendar, list, and timesheet for VAL-REG-002.
